_publications._publicationTitle: Therapeutic Vulnerability to ATR Inhibition in Concurrent

_contextSnippet: ATRX knockdown in the ALT-negative, NF1-associated sarcoma line JHH-CRC65 did not increase sensitivity to either ATR inhibition or temozolomide treatment
details: ATRX knockdown did not increase sensitivity to either ATR inhibition or temozolomide treatment
